description: Stores environment-specific configuration as named variables with typed values. Items (notebooks, pipelines, copy jobs, dataflows) read variables at runtime via notebookutils.variableLibrary.get(). Supports value sets for multi-environment deployment (dev/test/prod). Microsoft's strategic capability for Fabric CI/CD parameterization.
definition_parts: variables.json — All variable names, types, default values
valueSets/<name>.json — One file per alternate value set (overrides only)

flags.--sensitivity-label: Sensitivity label UUID to apply on creation

notes: Create is LRO (202, polls until complete)
Always deployed FIRST in deploy ordering (before all other item types)
Active value set is a workspace-level setting, NOT part of the definition
Value sets in definition contain only overrides (variables differing from default)
Naming convention: name value sets to match deploy --env values (dev, test, prod)
fabio deploy auto-activates the value set matching --env after deployment
Supports variable types: String, Number, Integer, DateTime, GUID, Connection reference, Item reference
Connection reference variables parameterize data source connections
Item reference variables manage cross-workspace item dependencies
Max 1000 variables and 1000 value sets per library (total cells < 10000, size < 1MB)
related_commands: fabio deploy apply --source <DIR> --workspace <WS> --env prod (auto-activates value set)
